title: crinum rigidum var. sumatranum
intro: Crinum rigidum var. sumatranum, a species of flowering plant, is a type of ornamental bulbous perennial that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are used to make infusions, decoctions, or poultices for topical application, although its use is not widely documented and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
